builtin.vtIpLookup.name: VirusTotal IP Lookup
builtin.vtIpLookup.description: Look up an IP address on VirusTotal to retrieve reputation, geolocation, and analysis statistics.
builtin.vtIpLookup.config.apiKey.label: API Key
builtin.abuseipdbCheck.name: AbuseIPDB Check
builtin.abuseipdbCheck.description: Check an IP address against the AbuseIPDB database for abuse reports and confidence scoring.
builtin.abuseipdbCheck.config.maxAgeInDa: Maximum age of reports to include
builtin.shodanHostInfo.name: Shodan Host Info
builtin.shodanHostInfo.description: Retrieve host information from Shodan including open ports, vulnerabilities, and organization details.
builtin.slackWebhookNotify.name: Slack Webhook Notification
builtin.slackWebhookNotify.description: Send IOC alerts to a Slack channel via an incoming webhook with rich Block Kit formatting.
builtin.slackWebhookNotify.config.channe: Optional channel to post to (overrides webhook default)
builtin.urlhausLookup.name: URLhaus URL Lookup
builtin.urlhausLookup.description: Look up a URL on URLhaus (abuse.ch) for known malware distribution activity. Requires a free API key from auth.abuse.ch.
builtin.urlhausLookup.config.apiKey.desc: Your abuse.ch Auth Key (free at auth.abuse.ch)
builtin.urlhausDomainLookup.name: URLhaus Domain Lookup
builtin.urlhausDomainLookup.description: Look up a domain on URLhaus (abuse.ch) for known malware distribution URLs. Requires a free API key from auth.abuse.ch.
builtin.urlhausDomainLookup.config.apiKe: Your abuse.ch Auth Key (free at auth.abuse.ch)
builtin.shodanInternetdb.name: Shodan InternetDB
builtin.shodanInternetdb.description: Free IP enrichment from Shodan — open ports, CVEs, hostnames, and tags. No API key required.
builtin.vtDomainLookup.name: VirusTotal Domain Lookup
builtin.vtDomainLookup.description: Look up a domain on VirusTotal for reputation, DNS records, and analysis statistics.
builtin.vtHashLookup.name: VirusTotal Hash Lookup
builtin.vtHashLookup.description: Look up a file hash (MD5/SHA1/SHA256) on VirusTotal for malware detection results.
builtin.vtHashLookup.config.apiKey.label: API Key
builtin.threatfoxLookup.name: ThreatFox IOC Search
builtin.threatfoxLookup.description: Search ThreatFox (abuse.ch) for known malware-associated IOCs — C2 servers, distribution URLs, payload hashes.
builtin.threatfoxLookup.config.apiKey.de: Your abuse.ch Auth Key (free at auth.abuse.ch)
builtin.malwarebazaarLookup.name: MalwareBazaar Hash Lookup
builtin.malwarebazaarLookup.description: Look up a file hash on MalwareBazaar (abuse.ch) — known malware samples, signatures, tags, and vendor intel.
builtin.malwarebazaarLookup.config.apiKe: Your abuse.ch Auth Key (free at auth.abuse.ch)
builtin.greynoiseCommunity.name: GreyNoise Community
builtin.greynoiseCommunity.description: Classify an IP as benign, malicious, or unknown using GreyNoise. Identifies known scanners, bots, and trusted services.
builtin.greynoiseCommunity.config.apiKey: Your GreyNoise Community API key (free at greynoise.io)
